---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Trinity Pattern
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the feature or improvement you'd like.

## Use Case

Why do you need this? What problem does it solve? How would you use it?

## Proposed Solution

How do you think this should work? Include examples, pseudocode, or schema changes if relevant.
